title: Possibility to move date value from one column to another

posts.author: Rasmus7700 (Rasmus Balle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Ability to run an automation where it is possible as the action to take the actual “Date Value” and put into another column…

Basically that possibility to move all values into another column from an automation

What are you trying to achieve

Possibility to have multiple columns usable for the “MyWork” so i can mirror the due dates from different time columns into a “Dummy” column that’s only used for MyWork - since that can’t handle multiple columns
